# Purinton Analytics, LLC

> Forensic vocational expert and life care planning practice providing objective, defensible
> evaluations of employability, earning capacity, wage loss, and the future cost of care for
> attorneys and insurers across the United States and Canada. Principal: Jason C. Purinton,
> LPC, CRC, CVE, ABVE/F, IPEC. Based in Kansas City, Missouri. Retained by both
> plaintiff and defense counsel; testifying in civil litigation since 2019.

## Contact
- Phone (office): (877) 882-9778
- Email: jason@pa-expert.com
- Offices: Kansas City · St. Louis · Denver · Chicago (meetings by appointment; remote evaluation, deposition, and trial testimony nationwide)
- Website: https://pa-expert.com

## Services
- [Vocational Expert Witness](https://pa-expert.com/services/vocational-expert-witness/): Objective evaluations of employability and earning capacity, with expert testimony.
- [Earning Capacity & Wage Loss](https://pa-expert.com/services/earning-capacity-evaluation/): Pre- and post-injury earning capacity and quantified wage loss analysis.
- [Life Care Planning](https://pa-expert.com/services/life-care-planning/): Comprehensive, evidence-based projection of future care needs and costs.
- [Case Management](https://pa-expert.com/services/case-management/): Vocational rehabilitation and medical case management.
- [Economic Damages](https://pa-expert.com/services/economic-damages/): Vocational and cost foundation for economic damages models.

## Practice Areas
- [Personal Injury](https://pa-expert.com/practice-areas/personal-injury/)
- [Workers' Compensation](https://pa-expert.com/practice-areas/workers-compensation/)
- [Employment Litigation](https://pa-expert.com/practice-areas/employment-litigation/)
- [Family Law](https://pa-expert.com/practice-areas/family-law/)

## Service Areas
Purinton Analytics serves attorneys and insurers across 7 states and 319+ cities and towns. Remote evaluation, deposition, and trial testimony are available throughout.
- [Missouri](https://pa-expert.com/locations/missouri/): vocational expert & life care planning services in Kansas City, St. Louis, Springfield, and 52+ more communities.
- [Illinois](https://pa-expert.com/locations/illinois/): vocational expert & life care planning services in Chicago, Aurora, Naperville, and 59+ more communities.
- [Michigan](https://pa-expert.com/locations/michigan/): vocational expert & life care planning services in Detroit, Grand Rapids, Warren, and 49+ more communities.
- [Kansas](https://pa-expert.com/locations/kansas/): vocational expert & life care planning services in Wichita, Overland Park, Kansas City, and 36+ more communities.
- [Colorado](https://pa-expert.com/locations/colorado/): vocational expert & life care planning services in Denver, Colorado Springs, Aurora, and 40+ more communities.
- [Nebraska](https://pa-expert.com/locations/nebraska/): vocational expert & life care planning services in Omaha, Lincoln, Bellevue, and 32+ more communities.
- [Idaho](https://pa-expert.com/locations/idaho/): vocational expert & life care planning services in Boise, Meridian, Nampa, and 30+ more communities.

## About
- [About Jason C. Purinton](https://pa-expert.com/about/): Credentials — Licensed Professional Counselor (LPC), Certified Rehabilitation Counselor (CRC), Certified Vocational Evaluator (CVE), Fellow of the American Board of Vocational Experts (ABVE/F), Forensic Vocational Expert (FVE), International Psychometric Evaluator Certified (IPEC).
